1 - год планирования:
A year ruled by the Sun. 
The most important year! 
The beginning of a nine-year cycle — how you live through this year determines the next eight years of your life. 
A year of hopes and new accomplishments. Imagine that this year you are God, the Creator, the Pioneer — create, act, and fear nothing. This is the start of a new cycle, a year of maximum rise in energy. A time of change in every area of life, of a fresh outlook on things and people. Everything you begin this year will have a powerful influence on the next nine years of your life, so you should picture clearly what you want and not let the opportunities and prospects opening before you slip away. This year you lay the foundation for the next nine years.
A wonderful year for any undertaking. You will gain not only motivation and goals, but also the necessary capital of knowledge and the opportunities to act. Do not waste your time — draw on all your talents, and you will see doors open before you. 
Your superiors will undoubtedly take notice of you this year, and as a result of your efforts you will advance in your career. Bring all your plans to life, and especially your business ideas. 
Every business proposal deserves attention: among them there may well be one that is highly profitable. 
All the creative powers you possess will become apparent to you, for the time has come to use them. Innovative ideas will visit you constantly — you need only give them an outlet.
You may set out on a journey, and it will enrich you with experience you will draw upon in the future. New faces will appear on the scene, and that is wonderful, because the people who enter your life this year will help you achieve success. Form and nurture friendly ties, for you are gaining friends, most likely for life (and certainly for the next eight years).
Welcome everything new and do not frown, whatever changes may come. They are for your good and open new paths to success and happiness. Climbing out of the well-worn rut is always a blessing, and especially this year, because this year you set the pace at which you will move throughout the entire nine-year cycle. 
This year you need no intermediaries. Take the initiative into your own hands and act. And above all — act, be bold, and do not lose your optimism.
A time of change, progress, and new beginnings. A person's actions this year exert a significant influence on the following nine years of their life. 
Formulate and clearly picture your goals, and begin working toward them. Seek out and do not miss the new opportunities and interesting ideas that open up. Your energy is on the rise — the time has come to act. During this year a person: An important theme this year is independence. It is best to rely only on your own strength, to step forward decisively and boldly, to express your individuality vividly. The time for diplomacy and forging alliances will come later.
This is a year of sowing. What you sow will bear fruit in the years to come. However, you should not expect immediate results this very year: the seeds cast into the soil need to gather strength and sprout.
Allow yourself to do what you enjoy most, what inspires you the most. Perhaps it is precisely this pursuit that will lead you to the success you long for. 
1. You will feel healthier mentally and physically and will move along the path of progress. 
2. You will achieve success at work. Bring more newness into your life: meet new people, try doing what you have never done before — and finally, refresh your wardrobe or take up a sport! Be sincere and open, and even excessive directness will do you no harm this year. 
3. You will encounter an important change in your life; all the changes will alter your current situation for the better.
4. You will meet people who will prove useful in the future. 
5. The year is favorable for creating works, taking part in competitions, founding a new financial enterprise, and acquiring equipment. For writers, musicians, and artists this year will be very important in the matter of creating new works.
2 - год взаимоотношения:
A year ruled by the Moon. 
This is a year of a certain relaxation, of peace, of relative calm. A year of establishing contacts, finding compromises, and seeking harmony and balance. Look for partners, set up mutually beneficial agreements.
Become a diplomat, show flexibility and gentleness. This is also a very emotional year — the likelihood of marriage and the birth of children is high. Suggestibility increases, as does receptivity to others' influence and the urge to submit to people or circumstances. Yet it may not be such a bad thing to yield to someone or something, since a drive for leadership and active efforts this year will most likely not bring the desired result. So calm yourself and float with the current, but do not lose sight of all the secondary details — they may turn out to be very important for you, and with their help you can adjust and refine your plans. Develop attentiveness and intuition.
 A year of patient waiting and calm. To wait and be patient is an overwhelming task for many people, so stressful situations are not out of the question. If the previous year was a year of new beginnings for you, this year you can relax and await some results from the efforts you put in last year. At least some of your labors will be rewarded, though it all depends on the timeframe the project was designed for. But in any case, this year you will certainly be repaid for your efforts. 
This does not mean you should sit idle while matters come to a happy conclusion — other proposals will appear, perhaps entirely unexpected and profitable. It is possible that this year you will take up a higher position, something you had aspired to before.
This year is above all a year of cooperation, so be ready, if necessary, to hand the reins over to someone else and act jointly rather than directing every stage of the project on your own. If you are at the head of a firm, you should of course not relinquish your authority, yet it is better to heed the opinions of your staff, who may propose new methods or solutions useful to you.
 Perhaps the partnership you sought so eagerly last year will flourish in the year ahead, and you should prove in practice that you are ready to collaborate. Such a partnership may well serve the careers of both, provided you do not insist on the priority of your own opinions. This is about team play. This year your charm and magnetism are irresistible — your circle of friends will grow considerably. And if you are not married, then among those around you there may now be the person with whom you will join your destiny. You should show tact when dealing with older people, which will not come easily to you. But by getting irritated you will achieve nothing, only widen the gulf between you, so summon your patience and resort to diplomacy as often as you can. 
You will win respect and love, and beyond that, gain peace of mind. And if difficulties arise at home or in business that plunge you into deep despondency and seem insurmountable, gather your courage and resolve them patiently and bravely. Everything can be overcome if you set yourself on victory. People will always meet you halfway if you seek their cooperation.
Do not push forward aggressively! Otherwise you may meet disappointment from the many delays and setbacks. Right now resources are being accumulated that you will need later on. Wherever possible, gather valuable information and build up financial means. This is a year of patient, unhurried advancement and growth. It is recommended to let go somewhat of what you pushed so actively last year, to allow matters to move forward on their own and to observe how they ripen and reveal their own character.
It is quite possible that you will call into question some of the initiatives of the Year of the One and recognize some of them as unrealistic. This is entirely normal: not every seed cast into the soil is destined to bear fruit. Prepare yourself to wait — now for one thing, now for another. Timing this year is less critical than in the years of the One or the Three. Right now resources are being accumulated that you will need later, ones that will nourish the entire current Epicycle. 
Wherever possible, gather valuable information and build up financial means. You need to become a diplomat, find your strategic allies, and establish mutually beneficial, balanced relationships with them. An inability to reach balance can become a cause of significant emotional turmoil.
This year will bring: 
* a rise in personal magnetism 
* new friends who will offer support in the future 
* fewer worries and less stress 
* emotionality, but also greater practicality 
* gains connected with real estate 
* a new house or a new apartment 
* changes in your way of thinking 
* an improvement in living conditions through patience and good planning
3 - год творчества и креативности:
A year ruled by Jupiter. 
This is a year of active creative self-expression and ascent. It is a year of decisive action and of bringing your boldest plans to life. It is time to stop drifting with the current — you need to take the situation under control. For this year everything that was begun and planned in the Year of the One finally starts to bear fruit. Surely this year new ideas and projects will arise that you can realize in the future. However, do not overstrain yourself, do not try to leap above your own head, and try not to burden yourself with unnecessary obligations and responsibility — in the Year of Three this can only do harm. It is best to engage in what brings you satisfaction and joy.
Be sociable, open up to the world, and give your talents and abilities the fullest possible outlet. A year of joy. Even if a person has had to work quite hard, everything will come about of its own accord and from a pure heart. The best time to make new acquaintances, strengthen ties with old friends, and discover new interests. A time to entertain and to be entertained. 
Fun and social success are the key to these twelve months, for the third personal year of the cycle is meant for entertainment, communication, and pleasures. This year people will be drawn to you, attracted by the richness and brightness of your personality. New, useful connections are quite possible if you seek them. Show yourself, present your ideas before those who can make you happy or help you succeed in business.
The time has come to "pop the question" if you wish to bind yourself in marriage, for this year you simply cannot help being a brilliant match for your chosen one. 
This is also a time for successful trade deals if you want to sell something — your offers on the market will be valued very highly. 
Self-expression implies speech, both spoken and written, but the word can serve you both for good and for ill, so weigh everything you say. You may unwittingly sow discord. It is better to think well before speaking, for once you let your words loose, you will not have time to come to your senses before you have offended someone. Let the gift of speech draw friends to you, make a favorable impression on colleagues and your boss, and create a warm, easy atmosphere within the family.
The written word is a manifestation of that same capacity for self-expression, and you may discover in yourself a talent for writing. A book, a story, or some project set down on paper you will sell without any trouble.
 Do every task with pleasure. This year will be very happy for you if you are receptive to its vibrations. Heavy, strenuous work is better postponed to next year. No, of course you must not shirk work or neglect your professional duties. It is simply that the work will go smoothly if you do it playfully. This opportunity comes to you only once every nine years, so do not miss it! 
It is also a symbol of sex, and you may be swept up by a sensuality unknown to you before. This means you are destined to experience passion or to discover physical love for yourself.
It is quite likely that from new relationships you will expect nothing but pleasurable sex. A taste for eroticism will awaken in you, and there is nothing wrong in being delighted by love affairs. However, know your measure! 
DO NOT MAKE EMPTY PROMISES. KEEP YOUR WORD IF YOU GAVE IT TO YOURSELF. BE CAREFUL WITH YOUR WORDS. GO TOWARD YOUR DREAM THIS YEAR — THE MAIN THING IS TO BE FOCUSED AND ORGANIZED. THIS YEAR, MORE THAN EVER, IT IS IMPORTANT TO BEFRIEND AND TO EXPRESS YOURSELF, TO DREAM AND TO CREATE! 
A year of active self-expression, enthusiasm, development, and creativity, marked by a heightened level of activity and energy.
Open up to other people, share with them what excites and gladdens you. Take an active part in social life, give the fullest possible outlet to your talents and abilities. Try not to take on any burdensome duties — in the Year of Three it is best to engage in what brings you joy and pleasure, in what you wholeheartedly love. The only thing to beware of is overspending your resources, the urge to leap above yourself. Do not open your purse too often, and try to keep your susceptibility to love in check: this year is fraught with "love triangles."
 You should expect the first significant results from the projects you began in the Year of the One. Ideas may help you adjust your goals, breathe life into them, or start something entirely new.
In the latter case, your design will prove more viable if it is based on the resources accumulated in the previous year. But if a new project rests on enthusiasm alone (of which you have no shortage this year), it is unlikely to survive the following year, the Year of the Four. Try to recharge yourself thoroughly in the Year of Three with energy and enthusiasm, to give a powerful creative impulse to the most important of your designs.
And do not be shy about looking younger than you really are — it will only draw the sympathy of those around you. 
This year will bring:
* a time for completing old projects 
* new friends and acquaintances. This year will also:
* bring financial success, name, and fame. A person will gain the opportunity for fuller self-expression. This year holds special significance for writers and speakers: they must be especially careful regarding their works and the speeches they deliver. Under the influence of Jupiter they will acquire honesty and fearlessness, which may later cause many problems. 
* be good for business and for opening new enterprises. 
* be good for planning and completing work.
* be a year of receiving a career promotion. 
* be a test of friends — and then it will be decided whether they are worth trusting or not.
4 - год стабильности и надежности:
A year ruled by Rahu. 
This is a year of stability and reliability. A year that loves clarity and practicality. 
Focus. The time has come to get down to work. The "Four" means you will work hard without respite. Whatever you wish to achieve in life, you must first carry the idea, then set about bringing it to fruition. And only afterward will the time come to reap the rewards. Set yourself a goal, establish a work regimen that will yield maximum return on the labor invested, and see to it that nothing distracts you from your progress toward the goal. You may feel that this year's burden is excessively heavy. It is quite possible that you will have to do the work of two — for yourself and for a comrade or spouse.
Do not complain — take heart. Everything you are doing now will bring dividends in its time. Do not count on receiving a substantial monetary reward, simply because the fourth personal year of the cycle does not favor a swift financial rise; rather, it will be gradual. However, for productive work, especially work that required extra time, you will of course be well paid. You may also be in for a career promotion — as a reward for your efforts. Therefore one cannot say that you will be straining in vain. But the main rewards will come later. 
Do not worry that you will lack the strength and resolve to bear such a time, for this year's vibration is one of strength and creation. This year you are endowed with the required endurance that will allow you to accomplish what you have planned.
This year you are able to lay the foundation of your entire future life — bearing this in mind, do not grieve over the weight of the burden, over the fact that the duties are unpleasant to you. Although this year you will form some new relationships, and not only lay the foundation of your career and financial stability, do not expect romances, do not count on plunging into a whirlpool of pleasures. Now is not the time for all that, not the time for scorching passion. 
However, if it is a matter of laying a firm foundation for personal relationships, then the time has come, for such relationships are built rather on mutual understanding and compatibility of character than on "blind" love or physical attraction.
Marriage takes on added significance in your eyes, since both you and your beloved now understand that it is not only kisses and embraces, but often hard labor that requires of you serious involvement in your partner's fate. Now you will invest far more in the marital relationship than in past years. Define your common goals and begin moving toward them. Though this year you may not see the fruits of the labor invested, you will be rewarded for your efforts in the fifth (next) personal year and in the following five years of the cycle. 
This year is good for buying real estate and acquiring a home! For entering into marriage. Any significant changes — a change of profession, a change of job, a relocation — may work against you.
A year of stabilization, consolidation, and work. The time has come to take matters firmly in hand, to concentrate on them, to focus your energy. This is a year of persistent labor, necessary to embody your designs, give them form, and set them on their feet. Seek out and reinforce the weak points of your projects. The Year of the Four is, one might say, a year of testing for strength. It is one thing to generate ideas and inspire those around you, and quite another to roll up your sleeves and finally realize what you have spoken about so much and so engagingly. Do not be afraid to take on responsibility, put matters in order, systematize, establish rules and demand that they be observed. 
The success of your long-term designs depends very strongly on how organized, orderly, efficient, and purposeful your activity is in the Year of the Four, and how diligently you fulfill all your obligations.
Be practical, do not look too far ahead. Draw up a detailed plan of all the necessary tasks and follow it strictly. Carry out a careful accounting of all available resources and do not allow them to be overspent. Learn to take satisfaction from work done conscientiously. The energy of the Year of the Four resonates with acquiring real estate, entering into marriage, and the birth of children — all those matters that at first bring much trouble but in the long run create something very important and lasting in life. 
This year will bring: 
* success achieved through great effort 
* a strength that unforeseen troubles and obstacles cannot shake 
* vigilance, hard work, and calm 
* financial success, an increase in the number of income sources, financial stability
* a new house or a new apartment 
* a favorable outcome. A wedding is foreseen. A meeting with a life partner will take place. Married people without children will have a child. 
* a favorable outcome for establishing relationships with friends and life partners.
5 - год изменений:
A year ruled by Mercury.
 A year of changes and transformations. A change of lifestyle is possible, whether intentional or by chance. A favorable time for travel and risky ventures.
This year concludes the stern period of labor and creation — you begin to reap the fruits of last year's efforts. This year symbolizes change and progress, so be ready for many exciting and astonishing events. 
The year favors wanderings, and you will probably spend some time on a trip. Perhaps it will be a business trip, but you undoubtedly need to go somewhere on vacation. And since you will have both time and money, do not deny yourself the pleasure. You will meet interesting people and enrich yourself with experience for a lifetime. 
This year the word regains its power, and success will accompany you in all spheres connected with communication and the use of the word, written and spoken — in literary creativity, public speaking, concluding trade deals, the advertising business, and so on.
If you are a writer, a teacher, or a performer, this year will be doubly fortunate for you, since the year's vibration corresponds to such kinds of activity. This year is a symbol of such pursuits. 
Since this year is also a symbol of His Majesty Chance for you, this year something unforeseen will undoubtedly happen that will turn your life upside down. Do not despair over the complete unexpectedness of what occurs. Take the changes calmly and consider what benefit you might draw from them in the future. Whatever you undertake at the start of the year will either not move forward or will require postponements, but do not lose heart — perhaps it is all for the best. Your financial situation may shift one way or another, so exercise prudence. Reliable shares and investments may fall and lose value, while capital that long seemed dead may suddenly begin to grow faster.
It is no wonder that, with the surprises raining down on you from all sides, your nerves will give way, and you will fear unpleasantness or worry excessively while anticipating success. Keep your composure — you need clarity of thought to handle what is happening in the best possible way. 
Love will certainly enter your life, for this year you will become very attractive to the opposite sex. However, because of the dominant vibration of change, the relationship is unlikely to have the happy outcome you would wish. But if the relationship is strong, then it has nothing to fear from the storm of changes that will descend upon you in your fifth personal year. 
Given the influence of the changeable vibration, you had better not enter into any alliances — of a business or other nature. Do not sign any papers, so as not to bind yourself to an irreversible decision, for you cannot avoid complications and regrets should the agreement be broken, which is quite likely. Do not grieve — the losses of the fifth year will always be compensated, and the time of your success is not far off. For now, enjoy the communication and entertainment in which the fifth personal year abounds. You are sure to have fun! 
A year of expansion, of widening horizons, of growth and development. Having gained a firm foundation in the previous year, your projects begin to grow upward and outward, to embrace new areas, perhaps to reach the international level. This is a year of travel, adventure, new acquaintances, impressions, and designs. You should not tie yourself to any routine schedules — you will achieve the greatest result if you are free and unconstrained.
Another undesirable tendency is the futile scattering of forces. Despite the variety of your affairs this year, try to ensure that all of them are in some way productive. The Five will offer you many interesting pursuits, thrilling impressions, and pleasant sensations, so there will be a real chance to plunge headlong into life's pleasures. And yet, try not to lose sight of your goals, otherwise all the advantages for which you worked in the previous years will be lost. From the standpoint of long-term projects, in the Year of the Five you must devote more attention to advertising. Last year you worked thoroughly; perhaps your warehouses are full of products — in both the literal and the figurative sense. 
Now you must tell the whole world what you are ready to delight it with. And do not be shy about praising yourself more often and more loudly — this year that is the foremost task. This year significant changes often occur — such as a change of job, of place of residence, or changes in relationships with people who matter to you. Be ready for the new that is entering your life. 
This year will be: 
* a year of success and financial stability; the number of friends will grow. 
* favorable for business and businesspeople. 
* favorable for trips abroad on business or for rest. 
* favorable for business partnerships. 
* one that keeps you on guard when delivering speeches. 
* one that keeps you on guard when signing business contracts.
 * favorable for media workers and those connected with them: writers, poets, actors, radio performers, and journalists.
 * favorable for taking part in risky ventures.
6 - год семьи:
A year ruled by Venus. 
A year of family and the home hearth. Loved ones may feel the need for help, advice, and a shoulder to lean on. 
This year it is recommended to buy or renovate a home and to make friends. This year you will be occupied above all with the home. If you are married — so much the better: this is a happy year for spouses. And if you are not yet bound in marriage and wish to start a home and family, this year your dreams may well come true. Love, charm, tenderness — this is what you should bestow on those dear to you: friends, relatives, husband or wife. You will grow closer than ever before and will be happy in the mutuality of feelings, especially from the people dearest to you.
A year of the home hearth, and, responding to the vibration, you will strive to improve your surroundings as much as possible. You will not begrudge time to make your workplace shine as well. In surroundings devoid of harmony you will feel very ill at ease, so follow your impulses. Let the imprint of your "self" be on everything around you — put your favorite flowers in a vase, hang family photographs, place the things dear to you where you will see them constantly. You will grow attached to your place of dwelling, and this warm feeling of "your own place" will instill in you tenfold strength and heighten your abilities. 
The need for stability may prompt you to buy a house or a plot of land for building, if it is within your means. But if you are not moving, then a renovation you simply must do! In the office, too, it would not hurt to refit a thing or two.
This year is connected with the realm of spiritual culture and all that is beautiful — with inspired music, art, and other forms of creativity. All of this will bring you immense joy and a sense of liberation this year. For people in the corresponding pursuits a very fruitful year has come. Acquaint those who can help you with your work — it will receive high praise.
 Perhaps you have always wanted to draw, sing, play some instrument simply for the soul, or try yourself as an actor in a small circle? The time has come. Give yourself free rein! Take lessons if your budget allows, or indulge in the pursuit as an amateur in your free time. It is a wonderful rest. A practical streak will reveal itself in you, and you will make quite sensible decisions. Your thoughts and good deeds will be directed above all toward the good of humanity.
All those in need will find comfort in you; everyone will be able to cry on your shoulder. You will always give wise advice and will rejoice that you have helped people at least a little. 
Fortunately, you will not have to worry about business and finances, because the vibration implies patronage and a spirit of goodwill; your needs will be met as if of their own accord. Live without straining your strength — all will be well with you, if not excellent!
This year you should set about securing a reliable "home front." This is, above all, your family, your loved ones, and your obligations toward them. Strive to fulfill these obligations easily and naturally, seek harmony and peace. No strain at all! This year you need to establish warm, lasting relationships and secure support — soon you will need it.
In all matters, smoothness, unhurriedness, and prudence are necessary. If it seems to you that this year's events are unfolding too slowly, do not worry: that is how it should be, everything goes in its own due course. This year you can strengthen your material well-being, make some acquisitions, take up adorning yourself and your home. This is a year when you clothe your emotions and desires in material form. Create comfort and a benevolent atmosphere in your home, savor the calm, the measured pace, and the simple joys of life. The Year of Family is the ideal time for changes in your personal life. 
This year family matters often come to the foreground — your obligations toward loved ones, the ability to establish harmonious relationships of mutual support with those dear to you.
You have crossed the pass of the Epicycle, understood much, accumulated knowledge and experience; now the time has come to apply all of it usefully, not only for yourself but for other people as well. 
In this way you secure a warm, favorable atmosphere and obtain the support you need to complete the Epicycle. Outwardly it may seem that all matters slow down this year. Yet at the same time their inner ripening is taking place; they become saturated with meaning and draw to you your true allies. As a result, the need arises to take into account not only your own interests but those of your partners, to share ideas with them, to be ready for compromise. At this stage the creative projects of different people unite to form something higher in level and far more valuable.
In long-term projects this year, around the original idea there forms a kind of club or community of supporters, enthusiasts, "fans." You must see to it that the results of your labor look attractive and evoke as many positive emotions as possible in those who deal with them. This year many wish to live more beautifully and cozily; they think about improving relations with relatives and try to change something in their dwelling to make it more comfortable. This is a good year for entering into marriage. 
This year will be: 
* favorable for establishing relationships with close relatives. 
* favorable for romantic relationships and the conception of a child. 
* favorable for interior designers, actors, musicians, poets, and artists, as well as for directors, people connected with the theater, and all who work in show business. It is also favorable for jewelers and those in the perfume business. 
* favorable for spending money on adornments, entertainment, and pleasures. 
* favorable for the employment of the unemployed. 
* a time to turn attention to adornments, sensual pleasures, worldly delights, and gifts. This year will also give a chance to receive unexpected wealth and a raise in salary.
7 - год духовных поисков:
A year ruled by Ketu.
 A year of self-deepening, solitude, and inner concentration. Try to limit social, outward activity and to develop inner qualities within yourself, such as patience, contemplativeness, and wisdom. A good time for acquiring new knowledge, beginning a cycle of serious study or mastering some craft, as well as for systematizing and ordering knowledge already gained, for reaching a new intellectual level. Perhaps, having deeply analyzed and understood your former mistakes and delusions and carefully thought through your further plans, in the coming year you will be able to act far more successfully and effectively. This year you may part with one of your friends or partners, severing relationships once important to you.
But do not be saddened, and remember: this year what leaves you is precisely that which hinders your development and forward progress, and only what you truly need remains. 
The calmest year. A person will need time to reflect on the state of affairs and outline plans for the future. A time of moderate pleasures and serious pursuits. A good time for raising your level of education and developing spiritual and metaphysical abilities. 
A subtle understanding of things and peace of mind are destined for you this year, since the vibration of the "seven" implies deep reflection and spiritual seeking.
Solitude will beckon you, and you will be glad to immerse yourself in your inner world. Reflections will help you decide how you would like to live and what is needed for life to flow in that channel. Analysis and criticism — this is where you will be strong; however, do not overdo it: sometimes excessive meticulousness does harm, and ill-timed lecturing may turn into unpleasantness for you. 
For you this year everything will move rather slowly — both affairs and personal matters. You will not make decisions at once, and your long deliberations will lead to perpetual delay. The year, on the whole, will be agonizingly long. But your ability to view things philosophically will come to your rescue. Restrain yourself when matters go awry or the schedule falls apart.
 Religion and the realm of the spirit will head the list of your interests; perhaps you will even take up the study of the occult sciences.
You will want to penetrate all the mysteries of the universe, and you will probably gain knowledge that will bring you fame and wealth in the future. A sense of self-satisfaction will be your best and fully deserved reward. Your reflections will sharpen your intuition and make you a more perceptive person. This year's vibration does not imply broad communication or romantic infatuations — you will have no such inclinations. 
The year greatly favors creativity — literary activity, inventiveness of various kinds. Your deep reflections will allow you to create something astonishing and beneficial — you need only set yourself such a goal.
A rest in a quiet, secluded place where you could take walks, sunbathe on the sandy shore, and ride a bicycle to your heart's content — that is the best way to spend your time in a year disposed to travel. You will also receive unexpected and very valuable gifts. Perhaps it will be an inheritance or something similar. 
This year is often perceived by many as a halt in development. An attempt at active forward movement during this period rarely yields adequate results and even threatens breakdowns. It even happens that, because of numerous stresses, a person falls ill — in this way Nature forcibly stops them, inviting them to submit to the ruler of the year. This year it becomes important to seek the deeper meaning, to realize the true essence of what you are engaged in. A period of inner development is simply necessary for an active, successful emergence into outer life in the following year.
This year it is recommended to reduce outward activity to a minimum, to spend more time in calm solitude, to study and thoroughly understand everything connected with your designs. Perhaps you will want to gain new knowledge that in the near future will allow you to become even more effective and successful. Or perhaps, in the haste of the previous years, you left some unfinished work in your project, and if you do not now go over everything in detail, checking it scrupulously and exactingly, minor shortcomings may one day spill over into major troubles. Your self-absorption and the decline in outward activity may lead some of your presumed allies to decide to part with you. Do not grieve over this — this year helps you shed the husk. This is a good year to find or restore contact with your soul. For some this means becoming acquainted with religion; others will prefer yoga, meditation, or the study of some esoteric disciplines.
This year will be: 
* a year of misunderstanding and difficulties. 
* a year of difficulties in business. Much work and little profit. 
* successful in conducting legal cases and lawsuits. 
* a testing of your friends and helpers.
 * a year when you can avoid unnecessary disputes.
 * one of devoting energy to healing, astrology, the practice of tantra, magic, and hypnosis.
 * one of slight risk. 
* a year when you must be careful in love affairs, so as not to earn a bad reputation. 
* a year when you must remain an optimist and not lose your temper — if you wish to succeed in your chosen work. Patience and an optimistic attitude will resolve all problems and obstacles.
This will also be a favorable year for healers, astrologers, and those who practice the occult sciences. 
In order for fortune to accompany you and for you not to sink into the abyss of self-rummaging, engage in study, learning, and reading. It is precisely this year that you will find answers to many questions that have long troubled you.
8 - год проверки на честность:
A year ruled by Saturn. 
One of the most important years of the cycle — you will need a great deal of energy, experience, and effort to attain the intended results and carry out all your ambitious plans. The material and financial sides of your life will manifest themselves especially vividly. Social activity is simply essential for you this year.
This is the next-to-last year of the cycle, so it is precisely now that you must carry out your ambitious plans, launch your own venture, invest money, and engage in business. Be active and decisive. All the knowledge, experience, and skills accumulated over the previous years of the cycle you will be able to apply with the greatest effectiveness precisely in the Year of the Eight. If your affairs are not going well, consider what you did wrong in past years, recognize your slips and mistakes, so as not to repeat them in the future. A year of financial success. A time of fortunate investments. This year symbolizes fame, power, and wealth, and the eighth personal year should bestow all of this upon you. If you have a goal on which all your thoughts and efforts have been concentrated, have no doubt that this year you will be rewarded, for this year points to the attainment of goals of a material nature.
This year is the number of the person of action, and your affairs will go more successfully than in any other year of the cycle. However, you must constantly keep your finances and property under control, so as not to miss the favorable moment to multiply what you have. Besides the moral satisfaction this year will bring you, you can count on large sums of money. For this very reason it is desirable that you enter into relationships exclusively with people in leadership positions, who can make a decision in your favor. You will diminish your chances by entering into contact with people vested with insignificant authority. 
This year an organizational talent will awaken in you, and you will be called upon to head all your undertakings. In the first months of the year fate will vest you with power and endow you with opportunities — do not fear to take on responsibility.
Remember that this year demands generosity from you to the same measure in which it is generous with you. This year you have the opportunity to engage in charity: give people a part of your time, money, and strength. 
Your organizational abilities open up the possibility of being useful to any charitable foundation, to say nothing of material support for such institutions. 
This is a year of testing for honesty and integrity; whoever passes this test will have GOOD FORTUNE favoring them in their affairs! 
The year is favorable for investing and buying a home, but do not allow unethical and immoral methods in achieving your goals — this will resound VERY strongly and negatively upon your personality. Any unexpected profit is a test of honesty and integrity. This year is a good chance for bachelors and unmarried women to arrange their personal lives. But it is necessary to show activity and to look around more often. 
The most important year for achievements — it is precisely now that your efforts will most determine the final result of the entire Epicycle. Use all the energy you have, all the accumulated knowledge and experience, to produce the maximum effect, to attain the highest productivity. Pay special attention to the material, financial results of your activity: it is precisely here that all your actions and achievements in the preceding years must manifest themselves and bear fruit.
Be effective, practical, let nothing escape your notice. Picture yourself as the managing director of your own life, approach all matters like an experienced businessperson — it is precisely this approach that will let you make optimal use of the potential of the money year. 
What matters too is the impression you make on those around you. Perhaps this year you will want to invest money in a more prestigious car or an expensive suit, so that your image matches the level to which you aspire. Try to see in every problem that arises on your path a potential opportunity for self-affirmation, a source of valuable experience. Be confident in yourself — this year you may well assume that for you nothing is simply impossible.
This year is a kind of examination of the Epicycle. Much will depend on your personal psychological strength, your charm, and your ability to win other people over to your side. So do not spare your strength, use all available means, and try to earn as high a grade as possible. 
This year will be: 
* favorable for politicians, social workers, and people working in the steel-foundry industry. This year will give the opportunity to start a new enterprise. 
* favorable for holding on to victory over enemies and winning legal cases.
 * a time to become independent, to rely on your own strength and judgment. 
* favorable for public work.
9 - завершающий год:
A year ruled by Mars. 
The final year of the cycle. Usually this is a pleasant year, though with a tinge of a certain melancholy. A time of regret for what has passed. A person sometimes finds it hard to part with things whose lifespan has already run out. At the same time, a person tries to glimpse the future and makes plans. At times they turn out contradictory and false; however, by the beginning of the following, first year of the cycle, thoughts about the future will take on real shape, and a person will understand what they truly need. 
The time has come to put an end to all relationships that no longer justify themselves, whether of a personal or a business nature. The year of farewell to the past has arrived. You need to prepare for an entirely new beginning, for the next year opens a new nine-year cycle of your life.
Do, so to speak, a great cleaning, and you can count on living the next nine years happily. To cling to what is devoid of prospects or unattainable is like putting up with a nagging infection, for, without being cured, you will never feel truly vigorous. Finish all your affairs — achieve the goal you set or give up any further attempts. No, this is not about being cruel — everything can be carried out gently, observing propriety. But the matter must be done, however difficult this may be for you. You may discover that former pursuits bore you, and that the people with whom you spent so much time together have suddenly begun to irritate you. Put an end to the relationships, do not force yourself — you have fallen under the power of the vibrations of the "nine" with its purifying nature. Is someone pumping energy or money out of you?
You must rid yourself of such people and no longer admit them into your life. Now is the best time to cleanse yourself of all foulness, otherwise it will torment you throughout the coming nine years. 
The time has come to attend to your health. Is some pain quietly wearing you down? Does a tooth ache, and have you long not seen the dentist? Have you long not had a medical checkup? If so, then make up for lost time — you must enter the next, your first personal year, in good health. You will not regret the time spent on doctors, for in the next, productive year all your strength will be needed if you truly set yourself new goals.
 And when life straightens out and settles, begin advancing skillfully forward.
Since this year the line between good and bad is too thin, the danger lurks of squandering your time and energy in vain on something not worthwhile, and thereby you will only harm yourself. This year you will need discernment and a certain selectivity to decide where to focus your efforts and who is worthy of your attention. Hold firmly to your own opinion and your own line of action. When you intend to give something up, do not allow interference from outside. You, like everyone, have your own particular destiny, and only you know what hinders you on life's path, which means you have the right to clear your path of obstacles. 
It is necessary to close out loans, to finish renovation and construction. The concluding year of the Epicycle. You must complete as many matters as possible — except for those that have a cycle of development longer than nine years.
Pay off your debts, let go of the one who himself wishes to leave you, rid yourself of unpromising ties. Be generous and let everything go with a light heart. Perhaps some of your designs proved not very successful and drag out a miserable existence. 
Part with them, for very soon a new phase of your life will begin — there will be new ideas, aspirations, opportunities. Why burden them with past mistakes? Also, listen for the signs of the new in your life. It may be simply an idea, or it may be a meeting with an important person. Most likely, by the inspiration that seizes you, you will at once understand that this is your future. Very often the wave of the Future arrives this year in September–October. You will understand why this happens when, below, we acquaint ourselves with the individual months.
Very many people this year experience anxiety; it seems to them that they are losing the goal and meaning of life, that everything is falling apart and collapsing. But this is not about life, only about the Epicycle drawing to a close. A little time will pass, and new goals will arise, a renewed meaning will appear in life. In the Year of the Nine it is advisable not to make any important decisions, simply because you may not even suspect what awaits you in the near future. 
This year will be: 
* a year of completing what was begun, of success and good fortune. 
* a year of the fulfillment of wishes. 
* success in struggle and competition. 
* recognition from society. 
* the possibility of an unexpected improvement in your financial situation: through a lottery, an inheritance, or other sources. This year you must avoid doubts and stubbornness. If you channel more energy into spiritual seeking, then this year will bring good results.
